D

dark - Variable in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D.FragmentSpec
The field for the dark record component.
dark() - Method in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D.FragmentSpec
Returns the value of the dark record component.
DARK_METAL_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
 
DARK_METAL_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
 
DARK_METAL_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
 
DARK_METAL_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
 
DECK_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
 
DECK_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
 
DECK_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
 
DECK_TOP_Y - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Deck top sits at this Y; every on-deck detail is built up from here.
DECK_TOP_Y - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
Deck top sits at this Y; every on-deck detail is built up from here.
deckTopY() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
 
DEFAULT_ELEVATION - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
deleteSavedGame() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.controller.persistence.SavedGameRepository
Deletes any saved game -- called once a match is actually finished, so a completed game can't be "continued".
deleteSavedGameAsync() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.controller.persistence.SavedGameRepository
Same as SavedGameRepository.deleteSavedGame(), but submitted to the same SavedGameRepository.SAVE_EXECUTOR queue as SavedGameRepository.saveAsync(com.example.battleship.model.Game), instead of running immediately on the caller's own thread.
deleteSaveOnGameOver() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
Once a match is actually won or lost, there's nothing left to "continue" -- clear the save so the menu reflects that.
DemoBattlefield3D - Class in com.example.battleship
Demo class: NOT part of the final game.
DemoBattlefield3D() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.DemoBattlefield3D
 
DemoShapes3D - Class in com.example.battleship
Demo class: NOT part of the final game, it only serves to preview the full fleet (1 aircraft carrier, 2 submarines, 3 destroyers, 4 frigates) already placed on the 3D board, and to visually verify that "hit" and "sunk" marks render correctly.
DemoShapes3D() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.DemoShapes3D
 
DESTROYER - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.ship.ShipType
3 per fleet, 2 cells each.
Destroyer3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view.ships
Destroyer: medium-sized ship, occupies 2 cells.
Destroyer3D(int, int, Orientation) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
 
detach() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
Stops listening for the "R" key -- call this once placement is done, so a later phase's own key handling isn't shadowed.
DRAG_SENSITIVITY - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
How many degrees the camera turns per pixel of mouse drag.
